rope.name: Rope
rope.description: A sturdy length of goblin-made rope.

wooden_plank.name: Wooden Plank
wooden_plank.description: A sturdy wooden plank, just the right size for a gap.

giant_mushroom.name: Giant Mushroom
giant_mushroom.description: A colourful mushroom as big as your head.

ancient_key.name: Ancient Key
ancient_key.description: A rusty old key. It looks like it fits a watchtower gate.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A lit torch. It casts a warm, flickering light.

broken_gear.name: Broken Gear
broken_gear.description: A cracked but fixable gear from some machine.

golden_acorn.name: Golden Acorn
golden_acorn.description: An acorn made of solid gold. Shiny!

crystal_lens.name: Crystal Lens
crystal_lens.description: A glass lens that reveals hidden inscriptions.

ancient_coin.name: Ancient Coin
ancient_coin.description: A coin from a forgotten civilization.

gemstone.name: Gemstone
gemstone.description: A glowing purple gemstone humming with energy.

apple.name: Apple
apple.description: A crisp red apple. Restores 1 heart.

roasted_mushroom.name: Roasted Mushroom
roasted_mushroom.description: A smoky grilled mushroom. Restores 3 hearts.

magic_spoon.name: Magic Spoon
magic_spoon.description: A spoon that may or may not be magical. Soup tastes better with it.

gold_tooth.name: Gold Tooth
gold_tooth.description: A shiny gold tooth. Worth something to a collector.
